input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph (entities and relations)
output: predicted preference scores for user-item pairs
backbone: multi-granular aggregation-enhanced GNN (with attention, FM, and Transformer)
key_idea: construct an Improved Collaborative Knowledge Graph (ICKG) and aggregate messages from multi-granularity and different node types using attention, FM, and Transformer
datasets: three public benchmarks (not named in abstract)
